modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by an end user through a self-service form submission and that the person who created it speaks Spanish as their first language.
You should write the description in a narrative style and use a formal and professional tone. The writing should have very limited detail and show strong technical proficiency. There should be poor spelling and grammar and some repeated wording or phrases.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Difficulty connecting to Azure Labs VM for Business School.

full_description_text:  
El usuario está intentando acceder a una máquina virtual en Azure Labs para la Escuela de Negocios. Sin embargo, no puede conectarse a la VM. Esto está causando problemas en su trabajo y necesita asistencia para resolver este problema de conexión.
